name: Thai Fried Noodles (3)
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Rice vermicelli - soaked in water for 20 minutes, then drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat. Add garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
2. Stir in fish sauce, lime juice, and palm sugar. Cook for 30 seconds to allow the sugar to dissolve.
3. Quickly add beaten eggs and cook for a few seconds, stirring constantly.
4. Mix in rice vermicelli, spreading it out to coat with garlic and egg mixture.
5. Add shrimp, half of the bean sprouts, and half of the green onions. Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes until noodles are heated through.
6. Transfer contents to a warmed serving dish. Garnish with remaining bean sprouts, green onions, dried shrimp, roasted peanuts, cilantro leaves, and lime slices.
